history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, eye-level shot shows a rooster being hand-fed on a tiled floor. The rooster, with vibrant reddish-brown and black plumage and iridescent blue tail feathers, is leaning forward, pecking at small pellets of feed held in an outstretched human hand. The hand, appearing to be a left hand, is positioned in the foreground, partially obscuring the rooster's head. The rooster's bright red comb is clearly visible. The floor is covered in large, square tiles with a reddish-brown hue, some of which show a slight sheen from reflected light. Scattered around the rooster's feet are a few stray feed pellets. The lighting appears to be natural, possibly from an overcast sky or indirect sunlight, creating soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the feathers and tiles. The mood is intimate and gentle, capturing a moment of interaction between human and animal. The color palette is dominated by warm earth tones of the tiles and rooster's feathers, contrasted by the cool blues of the tail feathers and the bright red of the comb. The overall impression is realistic with a slightly shallow depth of field, focusing attention on the feeding action.
